heroSubtext: GLUCOSE deploys AI Experience Agents that represent your brand, know your products, and engage every customer — across every channel, in every language, 24/7.
shiftHeading: AI is becoming the interface. If you don't deploy your own agent, someone else will represent your brand.
shiftCallout: GLUCOSE gives brands their own autonomous AI Experience Agents

shiftCards.label: Legacy
shiftCards.title: CRM is reactive
shiftCards.body: Traditional CRM stores records and triggers workflows — it cannot adapt in real time to non-linear customer journeys.

shiftCards.label: Current
shiftCards.title: Chatbots are scripted
shiftCards.body: Rule-based bots follow decision trees. They break on complexity, can't handle multi-intent requests, and frustrate customers.

shiftCards.label: Future
shiftCards.title: Agentic AI is autonomous
shiftCards.body: Goal-driven AI agents reason, adapt, and act — representing your brand across the entire customer lifecycle without scripts.

glucoseDescBlocks.heading: Your brand. Always running on GLUCOSE.
glucoseDescBlocks.body: Imagine your brand showing up for every customer—answering, guiding, engaging—autonomously. That's GLUCOSE.

glucoseDescBlocks.heading: AI Experience Agents
glucoseDescBlocks.body: You define goal-driven AI Experience Agents that know your products, speak your brand, and follow your rules. GLUCOSE orchestrates them across every touchpoint, every channel, every language. No scripts. No queues. No overhead.

glucoseDescBlocks.heading: Unlock Unparalleled Engagement
glucoseDescBlocks.body: GLUCOSE is an intuitive and reliable Agentic AI designed for brands to enhance, introduce, explain, demonstrate, and personalize product-specific features and experiences—autonomously across every touchpoint.

glucoseDescBlocks.heading: Control the Product Experience
glucoseDescBlocks.body: GLUCOSE offers an unprecedented opportunity for Brands to engage with captive users and control the Product Experience across all stages of the Customer and Product Lifecycles.

demoHighlightHeading: Watch GLUCOSE handle real customer conversations
demoHighlightBody: See how GLUCOSE turns intent into action with autonomous guidance, multimodal understanding, and seamless conversion journeys across messaging channels.
demoVideoTitle: Sales Opportunity Signal: Test Drive Booking
whyHeading: AI Experience Agents for Brand & Product Experiences

whyCards.title: AI Experience Agents
whyCards.body: Create exceptional brand and product experiences with autonomous AI agents that engage every customer—personally and contextually across every channel.

whyCards.title: Own Your Brand Representation
whyCards.body: AI is becoming the interface. GLUCOSE gives you full control over how your brand is represented—your voice, your rules, your customer relationships.

whyCards.title: Safety, Guardrails & Eval
whyCards.body: Enterprise-grade trust built in. Automated testing, real-time evaluation, compliance guardrails, and full auditability—so your AI always stays on brand and on policy.

whyCards.title: Insights & Analytics
whyCards.body: Every conversation is data. Not surveys, not inferred behavior—actual customer intent, unfiltered, from real interactions. Insights you can't get anywhere else.

platformSubtext: AI agents that follow your SOPs, connect to your systems, and handle complex customer interactions—with precision, enterprise-wide.
securityBody: GLUCOSE is built with enterprise-grade security, ensuring your data remains protected while delivering exceptional customer experiences.
ctaBody: Discover how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise run autonomous brand experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.

testimonials.quote: GLUCOSE transformed how we engage with customers post-purchase. The AI understands our bikes better than most humans—and it speaks our brand voice perfectly. Our customers get instant, accurate answers about everything from maintenance to accessories.
testimonials.name: CEO

testimonials.quote: The platform's ability to understand context and deliver personalized responses transformed customer support operations. It's like having a team of experts available 24/7.
testimonials.name: Gennady K.

testimonials.quote: GLUCOSE changed how we think about customer engagement. The AI doesn't just respond—it understands our products and brand voice perfectly.
testimonials.name: Product Head

testimonials.quote: We've seen a dramatic improvement in response quality and customer satisfaction since implementing GLUCOSE. The autonomous agents handle complex queries with ease.
testimonials.name: Tech Lead

testimonials.quote: The platform handles everything from warranty inquiries to service bookings autonomously. Our customers get instant, accurate responses around the clock.
testimonials.name: Service Manager

testimonials.quote: Patient engagement has never been easier. The AI understands medical context and provides appropriate guidance while maintaining compliance.
testimonials.name: Digital Health Director

testimonials.quote: Our customers receive personalized financial guidance instantly. The compliance guardrails give us confidence to scale without risk.
testimonials.name: VP Customer Experience

testimonials.quote: Post-purchase support is now a competitive advantage. Customers love getting instant help with setup and troubleshooting.
testimonials.name: Product Manager

testimonials.quote: We reduced support costs by 40% while improving CSAT scores. The AI handles routine queries so our team can focus on complex issues.
testimonials.name: CX Operations Lead

testimonials.quote: Subscriber engagement increased significantly. The AI recommends content and handles account queries with our brand's personality.
testimonials.name: Head of Growth
